{"kind":"cannot-formalise","why":"hydrogel is a technical material science concept requiring domain-specific vocabulary (polymers, cross-linking, absorption capacity, three-dimensional networks) and synthetic manufacturing processes. Its identity depends on specific chemistry thresholds and structures not expressible in the prime lexicon or available catalog concepts. It belongs to the materials science sector, not the semantic primitive tier."}

<<<KOT:idolatrously>>>>
{"kind":"cannot-formalise","why":"idolatrously is the adverbial form of idolatrous, which denotes a religiously and culturally specific attitude (worship of idols; treating something as an object of worship). This sense presupposes familiarity with religious practice and the concept of idolatry, which cannot be grounded in the prime lexicon independent of those domain assumptions. The adverbial form compounds this dependency."}
<<<END:idolatrously>>>>
